Patch Set 1:

I tried to verify using oom by giving a snapshot 1.1.2-20220504T015001Z
but got this:
09:21:10 
[ERROR] Only release images are allowed in helm charts.
09:21:10 [ERROR] Images not found in release repo:
09:21:10 
09:21:10 onap/org.onap.dcaegen2.services.components.slice-analysis-ms:1.1.2-20220504T015001Z
09:21:10 Makefile:91: recipe for target 'check-for-staging-images' failed
09:21:10 make: *** [check-for-staging-images] Error 1
So I verify the image locally. It looks good to me.
@Niranjana niranjana.y60@wipro.com Could you try it in your environment?
Change has been successfully merged by Vijay Venkatesh Kumar

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> I tried to verify using oom by giving a snapshot 1.1.2-20220504T015001Z
> but got this:
> 09:21:10 
> [ERROR] Only release images are allowed in helm charts.
> 09:21:10 [ERROR] Images not found in release repo:
> 09:21:10 
> 09:21:10 onap/org.onap.dcaegen2.services.components.slice-analysis-ms:1.1.2-20220504T015001Z
> 09:21:10 Makefile:91: recipe for target 'check-for-staging-images' failed
> 09:21:10 make: *** [check-for-staging-images] Error 1
> So I verify the image locally. It looks good to me.
> @Niranjana niranjana.y60@wipro.com Could you try it in your environment?

OOM error on verify for snapshot was expected. Typically snapshot validation is useful if there are any E2E test enabled in gating (i.e smoke usecase), for slice mS as there are none - we can skip the step to submit snapshot under OOM.
